title: InvoiceRequest
description: Parameters for the ccap/invoice method. Creates a payment request from the agent to a client or another agent.

idempotency_key.description: UUID v4 deduplication key. The server returns the cached result for any duplicate request with the same key within a 24-hour window.

amount.description: Invoice amount. Must be positive. For USD and USDC, at most 2 decimal places. For ETH, at most 18 decimal places.

currency.description: Currency in which the invoice is denominated.

description.description: Human-readable description of the service being invoiced. Appears on the payment receipt.
examples: Contract review: ACME NDA v3 (14 pages)

recipient_wallet.description: Destination for payment. Either an Ethereum-compatible wallet address or an email address for fiat invoices.

due_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime by which payment is due. Defaults to 7 days from creation if omitted.

line_items.description: Optional itemised breakdown of the invoice. The sum of (quantity * unit_cost_usd) across all items should equal amount (when currency is USD). Informational only; does not override amount.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for the agent's internal tracking. Not displayed to the payer.

LineItem.description: A single line item in an itemised invoice.

description.description: Human-readable description of this line item.

quantity.description: Number of units. May be fractional (e.g. 0.5 hours).

examples.description: Contract review: ACME NDA v3 (14 pages)
